\documentclass{siddur}

% Custom page numbering to yield 170.a, 170.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{170.\alph{page}}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  \begin{hebrew}
  אַתָּה קָדוֹשׁ וְשִׁמְךְ קָדוֹשׁ \\
וּקְדוֹשִׁים בְּכָל יוֹם \\
יְהַלְלוּךְ סֶלָה.* \\
בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה, יְיָ, הָאֵל הַקָּדוֹשׁ. \\
*SHABBAT SHUVAH - בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה, \\
יְיָ, הַמֶּלֶךְ הַקָּדוֹשׁ.
  \end{hebrew}%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  ATAH kadosh v'shimcha kadosh \\
uk'doshim b'chol yom \\
y'hal'lucha, selah.* \\
Baruch atah Adonai, Ha-El hakadosh. \\
*SHABBAT SHUVAH - Baruch atah, \\
Adonai, HaMelech hakadosh.%
}

\newcommand{\blockC}{%
  YOU ARE HOLY, Your Name is holy, \\
and those who are holy praise You every day.* \\
Blessed are You, Adonai, the Holy God. \\
בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה, יְיָ, הָאֵל הַקָּדוֹשׁ. \\
Baruch atah, Adonai, Ha-El hakadosh. \\
*SHABBAT SHUVAH - \\
Praised are You, Adonai, Holy Sovereign. \\
בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה, יְיָ, הַמֶּלֶךְ הַקָּדוֹשׁ. \\
Baruch atah, Adonai, HaMelech hakadosh.%
}

\newcommand{\blockD}{%
  This third blessing of praise in the y Amidah emphasizes God's holy nature. Even God's \\
name is holy.%
}
